title: Chunk Animator Plus
description: Adds smooth animated chunk loading and rendering effects
body:
**Chunk Animator Plus**

Chunk Animator Plus adds smooth animated chunk loading effects to Minecraft, making terrain rendering feel more dynamic and visually polished instead of chunks appearing instantly.

The mod animates newly loaded chunks with customizable movement and easing effects, improving immersion while exploring, flying, or generating new terrain.

**Features**

* Smooth chunk loading animations
* Multiple animation modes
* Custom easing functions
* Lightweight client-side implementation
* Vanilla-friendly visuals
* Configurable animation speed and behavior
* Multi-version support
* Designed to work alongside optimization mods

**Animation Modes**

- BELOW
- ABOVE
- HYBRID
- HORIZONTAL_SLIDE
- HORIZONTAL_SLIDE_ALTERNATE

**Easing Types**

- LINEAR
- QUAD
- CUBIC
- QUART
- QUINT
- EXPO
- SINE
- CIRC
- BACK
- BOUNCE
- ELASTIC

**Performance**

Chunk Animator Plus is designed to be lightweight and client-side only.
The mod does not affect gameplay mechanics or world generation.

**Compatibility**

- Client-side only
- Works on multiplayer servers without installation on the server
- Compatible with most visual and performance mods

Explore Minecraft with cleaner and more immersive chunk rendering.
